english_text: I have a blind date today
My company set up a blind date
I don't want to go on a blind date
Can someone go in my place?
I went instead of my friend
I pretended to be someone else
This is so embarrassing
I got caught
I can explain
It's not what you think
Please let me explain
I didn't mean to deceive you
I'm sorry for lying
Can we start over?
I want to be honest with you
The truth is I like you
From the first moment I saw you
My heart knew
You're different from what I expected
In a good way
You're full of surprises
That's what I like about you
Stop making my heart flutter
I can't concentrate at work
Because I keep thinking about you
Are you thinking about me too?
We work at the same company
Office romance is complicated
We should keep this a secret
Everyone already knows
We're not very good at hiding it
The whole office is talking about us
My boss found out
This is awkward
But I don't care anymore
I want to be with you openly
Will you officially date me?
Yes I will
Let's have lunch together
I packed lunch for both of us
You're so thoughtful
I wanted to do something nice
Meeting after work is the best part of my day
korean_text: 퇴근 후 만나는 게 하루 중 제일 좋아요
romanization: toegeun hu mannaneun ge haru jung jeil joayo

english_text: Let's go on a real date
I made a reservation at a nice restaurant
This is where we first met
I remember everything about that day
You were so nervous
So were you
I'm glad we met
You changed my life
I can't imagine life without you
korean_text: 당신 없는 삶은 상상이 안 돼요
romanization: dangsin eomneun salmeun sangsangi an dwaeyo

english_text: Thank you for being you
I love everything about you
Let's make many more memories
Here's to our love story
A business proposal became real love
Our love story is the best
Every love starts somewhere unexpected
korean_text: 모든 사랑은 예상치 못한 곳에서 시작돼요
romanization: modeun sarangeun yesangchi motan goseseo sijakdwaeyo

english_text: Because it led me to you
